rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §37.0062, which governs instructional requirements for alternative education services in juvenile residential facilities. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The commissioner shall determine the instructional requirements for education services provided by a school district or open-enrollment charter school in a pre-adjudication secure detention facility
_note: No conflict; the rule concerns juvenile justice education services and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
